examples.title: Algorithm: Periodic Noise Reduction
examples.description: Pseudocode for periodic noise reduction using frequency domain filtering
examples.code:
ALGORITHM PeriodicNoiseReduction
INPUT: noisy_image
OUTPUT: filtered_image

BEGIN
  // Convert the image to the frequency domain
  freq_image = FFT(noisy_image)
  // Filter out the frequencies that correspond to the periodic noise
  filtered_freq_image = LowPassFilter(freq_image)
  // Convert the filtered image back to the spatial domain
  filtered_image = IFFT(filtered_freq_image)
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the steps involved in periodic noise reduction using frequency domain filtering.

examples.title: Python: Periodic Noise Reduction
examples.description: Python implementation of periodic noise reduction using frequency domain filtering
examples.code:
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from scipy.signal import fftconvolve

# Generate a noisy image
img = np.random.rand(256, 256) + 0.5

# Convert the image to the frequency domain
freq_img = np.fft.fft2(img)

# Filter out the frequencies that correspond to the periodic noise
freq_img_filtered = np.copy(freq_img)
freq_img_filtered[:, :, 0:10] = 0  # filter out low frequencies

# Convert the filtered image back to the spatial domain
img_filtered = np.real(np.fft.ifft2(freq_img_filtered))

# Display the original and filtered images
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 5))
plt.subplot(1, 2, 1)
plt.imshow(img, cmap='gray')
plt.title('Original Image')
plt.subplot(1, 2, 2)
plt.imshow(img_filtered, cmap='gray')
plt.title('Filtered Image')
plt.show()
examples.explanation: This Python code demonstrates the implementation of periodic noise reduction using frequency domain filtering.
